creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Tue, Sep 12, 2006 at 08:09:28AM +0000, John Beukema wrote:

> >Description:
> I have experienced multiple panics after mounting a cdrom as root, using it for a while then doing other things on the hard disk.  After 30 or so minutes, cd'ing to /cdrom gives an error message.  Attempting to umount /cdrom causes panic and crash.

Please provide full details of the panic (see the developers handbook
chapter on kernel debugging).

Kris
